The '''P-100 pick-up droid''',<ref name="SWKidsDroids">{{SWKidsYouTube|series=Star Wars By the Numbers|text=Every Droid in Star Wars|video=UQg6aX7lqTA|nolive=1}}</ref> also known simply as the '''pick-up droid''', was a [[droid]] used for manual relocation of large items. It could be deployed from the underside of [[P-100 Salvage Droid]]s to retrieve valuable parts from crashed [[podracer]]s and return them to the storage hold of the P-100.<ref name="CL" /> 

{{Droid-stub}}
